summary: iter247 testing complete - Reports Hub (12 endpoints), Chef Carissa Pastry persona, Mobile More tab with module drawer, and regression tests all PASSED. All 16 backend tests passed. Desktop Reports Hub renders correctly with all 12 reports, GM Snapshot shows KPIs, Sales by Profit Center shows 10+ outlet rows, finance filter works. Mobile More tab opens module drawer with all groups, EchoAurium correctly blocked on mobile with warning banner visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports Hub uses hash-based stable demo data when source collections are empty - this is intentional and response includes demo:true flag

Chef Carissa system prompt (lines 40-133 in chef_carissa_training.py) contains comprehensive pastry-specific content: lamination, tempering, wedding cake construction, allergen protocol, viennoiserie, plated desserts, etc.
Mobile module drawer correctly blocks EchoAurium/P&L modules via BLOCKED_ON_MOBILE set in MobileModuleDrawer.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter247 features verified: (1) Reports Hub has 12 endpoints all returning correct data structures with demo flag, (2) Chef Carissa has pastry-specific persona in CARISSA_SYSTEM_PROMPT, (3) Mobile More tab opens module drawer with all groups, EchoAurium blocked with warning banner, (4) Desktop sidebar groups (Pastry, Menu Engineering, Hotel Ops) all visible, Support panel loads correctly.
